raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint is about a {$140.00} charge on XXXX from XXXX XXXX XXXX. 
The airline made a Significant Schedule Change to my passenger 's itinerary. According to XXXXXXXX XXXX " If your flight is significantly changed or cancelled by the airline, you may be eligible for a refund or to rebook. '' The original itinerary was a flight from XXXX  to XXXX  with a stop in XXXX with an estimated arrival time of XXXX on XX/XX/year>. 
The airline made the scheduled change and the new arrival time was XXXX more than 8 hours after. This change was unacceptable to my passenger so the flight was changed
to XX/XX/XXXX with a stop in XXXX XXXX. This change resulted in the plane ticket becoming unusable since my passenger requires a XXXX  XXXX  to transit through the XXXX airport. I had to pay for another flight on another airline.

The airline refused to change the flight again and Citi Card 's response is that " the merchant cancellation / return policy was not followed '' even though it is the policy of the airline to refund or rebook for a significant schedule change.
